name: Magical Mic Duel: Senpai, Hear My Spell
short_description: ଘ(੭ˊᵕˋ)੭* ੈ✩‧₊˚ Embrace your destiny in Magical Mic Duel: Senpai, Hear My Spell! Your voice commands the forces of fabulousness. Chant spells with conviction, and witness dazzling displays of magical might! The world needs your power. Step up and claim your place as the ultimate magical girl!
detailed_description:
Attention: A microphone connected to your PC and a ☆magical girl☆ mindset are required to play this game.
For the best experience, it is recommended to connect the microphone directly to the PC without using any additional devices or effects for best experience.

〜(￣△￣〜) The long-awaited Episode 2 update!! (〜￣△￣)〜

ଘ(੭ˊᵕˋ)੭* ੈ✩‧₊˚ Experience Bujang Kim's new adventure.

Encounters with new characters, and new ways to magically battle evil! ദ്ദി ˃ ᴗ ˂ )

In Magical Mic Duel: Senpai, Hear My Spell, you become a magical girl and engage in magical battles. Just chant the spells displayed on the screen! Your voice spells will be analyzed by cutting-edge technology and cast as elegant and beautiful magic. The world needs your magic right now, for world peace! ଘ(੭ˊᵕˋ)੭* ੈ✩‧₊˚

Game Overview

♥ 2024 Seoul, where the declining birth rate has led to a shortage of magical girls

♥ Life is tough due to severe conflicts! ଘ(,´ o`)ଓ What we need is a magical girl ദ്ദിˊᗜˋ)!

♥ ⁉️ Do you also have a burning desire to protect your loved ones!? ✧⁺⸜(･ ᗜ ･ )⸝⁺✧

♥ Then become the middle-aged male magical girl you've always imagined and save the world!

♥ Magically Duel with friends or foes over the network or on the same computer

♥ Excessive immersion can bring positive energy to the lives of those around you. (˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧

Casting Spells

♥ Simply chant various spells with ☆all your heart☆ to cast them. ଘ(੭˃ᴗ˂)━☆ﾟ.*･｡ﾟ

♥ Strong magic comes from a strong heart. The more sincerity you put in, the more powerful attacks you can unleash.

♥ Try to ♬attack your opponents in various ways♬, such as with high notes♬, loud voices, ✧ special rhythms and more! (Episode 2 update!)✧

♥ All you need to prepare is a strong will, a loud voice, and the heart of a magical girl. (˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧

Exciting Story

♥ Set in modern Seoul, which is suffering from a shortage of magical girls.

♥ Buckle up for a dazzling cast of characters, each with a personality as quirky as their magical attack!

♥ Your seemingly ordinary boss might secretly wish for frilly outfits and a magic wand!

♥ A series of events that could happen to you right now, the best solution to solve problems is the lovely magic of a magical girl.

♥ Follow the story and make a firm commitment to live as a magical girl in the world, both day and night!

Note:

The game is not affiliated with any real-life organizations or individuals and is for entertainment purposes only.
